title: TAS
description: Topology Agnostic Structure (TAS) v2 — describes a complete power converter design as three sections: inputs (the spec the converter must satisfy), topology (how it is built), outputs (how it performs). Mirrors the same three-section pattern that EAS / MAS / SAS / CAS / RAS use for individual components. Replaces v1's components.json + circuit.json + designVariants[] + paretoFront.

inputs.description: Design specification + operating points the converter must satisfy.

topology.description: Components used in the converter plus the circuit graph that wires them.

outputs.description: Computed/measured results: per-design metrics (cost/volume/mass/footprint) plus per-operating-point losses, stresses, KPIs.
